summary: Mentor Analytics Dashboard feature fully tested. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements working correctly including summary cards, mentor table, filters, sorting, detail modal, and export functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoints properly implemented with all required metrics
Frontend MentorAnalytics component correctly displays all summary cards
Search, sort, and date range filters working correctly
Mentor detail modal shows session-wise breakdown with all required fields
CSV export functionality working for both summary and individual mentor sessions
Data integrity verified - summary totals match sum of individual mentor data

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and interactions working

seed_data_creation: Used existing data: 23 mentors, 24 completed sessions, 13 cancelled, 0 no-shows, 1 rescheduled. Total earnings ₹31,600, revenue ₹55,500.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mentor Analytics dashboard fully tested. All backend endpoints working: GET /api/admin/mentor-analytics/summary (with sorting, filtering, search), GET /api/admin/mentor-analytics/mentor/{id}/sessions (with pagination), GET /api/admin/mentor-analytics/export (CSV/JSON), GET /api/admin/mentor-analytics/mentor/{id}/export-sessions. Frontend displays all metrics correctly with interactive table, detail modal, and export buttons.

summary_endpoint.details: GET /api/admin/mentor-analytics/summary returns all mentor data with metrics

export_endpoints.details: CSV and JSON export working for summary and individual mentor sessions

data_integrity.details: Summary totals match sum of individual mentor data

frontend_summary_cards.details: All 8 summary cards displayed: Completed, Cancelled, No-Shows, Rescheduled, Avg Rating, Pending Feedback, Mentor Earnings, Platform Revenue

frontend_mentor_table.details: Table displays 23 mentors with all columns: Mentor, Completed, Cancelled, No-Shows, Rescheduled, Rating, Pending FB, Earnings, Revenue, Actions

frontend_filters.details: Search by name/email, date range filters, sort by dropdown all working

frontend_detail_modal.details: Clicking mentor row opens modal with session stats, financial info, and session-wise breakdown table

frontend_export.details: Export CSV button present and functional, Export Sessions CSV in modal

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real MongoDB data. Mock-login endpoints are for testing purposes only.
